title: Ruschia scopelogena
taxonomy: Ruschia scopelogena is classified within the family Aizoaceae, which is commonly referred to as the ice plant family. This family is further divided into the subfamily Ruschioideae, which is a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The genus Ruschia is part of the tribe Ruschieae within the subfamily Ruschioideae. Ruschia scopelogena is also known as the 'scopelogena' or the 'scopelogene', and is a succulent plant species. The classification of Ruschia scopelogena is a part of the larger system of plant taxonomy.
